canvas.title: Vision
canvas.subtitle: Overarching goal
canvas.description: What is our motivation for creating the product? Which positive change should it bring about?

canvas.title: Target group
canvas.subtitle: Market or market segment
canvas.description: Which market or market segment does the product address? Who are the target customers and users?

canvas.title: Problem
canvas.subtitle: Problem and benefit
canvas.description: What problem does the product solve? Which benefit does it provide?

canvas.title: Product
canvas.subtitle: USPs, feasibility
canvas.description: What product is it? What makes it stand out? Is it feasible to develop the product?

canvas.title: Business goals
canvas.subtitle: Company benefit
canvas.description: How is the product going to benefit the company? What are the business goals?
